features: Suki Gifts, Medium Neptune Turtle, 24cm, Yellow Plush Toy, 14475
Soft boa yellow turtle with light brown shell.
Part of the Neptune Turtle family
description: Product Description Suki's medium Neptune Turtle is so adorable. Its irresistible soft boa yellow turtle with light brown shell is perfect for little hands. Available in small, medium and large as well as Backpack clip and Mummy & Baby style. Suki Gifts International are a new and innovative British Company which specialises in Gifts for everyone. Based in the UK with a friendly field sales team, all our products are designed in-house by our Product Development Team. Backed by great Customer Service and warehouse staff, we are able to deliver quality products when you need them. Safety Warning Remove all tags before giving to children
